summary: Sign-in and sign-up pages use AuthContext and shared styled auth UI.
responsibilities: Submit email/password credentials to AuthContext actions.
Expose Google OAuth login through AuthContext.
Display Appwrite errors without exposing additional sensitive data.
invariants: Password inputs must keep a minimum length of 8 unless auth requirements change.
Authenticated users should not remain on signin or signup pages.
Auth forms must prevent default browser submission and handle asynchronous failures.
